events.title: Broken Wagon
events.body: A merchant wagon has split open beside the road. The blood on its contract tags has already gone black.

choices.label: Repair the salvage
choices.description: Lose 7 HP. Gain a random common or uncommon equipment.

events.title: Black Fingerprint
events.body: An innkeeper with a blackened fingerprint offers a clean oath tag and refuses to explain where it came from.

choices.label: Buy the tag
choices.description: Pay 40 gold. All companions gain 8 bond.

choices.label: Question them
choices.description: Gain 10 gold from nervous hush money.

events.title: Lost Smith
events.body: A field smith has kept a small forge alive under a collapsed arch. The fire is honest; the prices are not.

choices.label: Work the bellows
choices.description: Lose 8 HP. Upgrade the first unupgraded card in your deck.

choices.label: Commission gear
choices.description: Pay 95 gold. Gain a random equipment.

events.title: Companion Trace
events.body: A sign only a contract fighter would leave points toward a safer trail through the ruin.
